penalize-over-editing.description: Guidelines for heavily penalizing images that follow the instruction but introduce destructive, unintended changes to the original image.

world-knowledge-and-entities.description: Strategy for evaluating prompts containing specific artists, cultural references, or named entities.

verify-image-content-and-ocr.description: Techniques to prevent hallucinating empty images and mixing up Image A and Image B during OCR.

text-and-ocr-verifier.description: Extracts and verifies text from specific regions of images to prevent hallucinating text or mixing up Image A and Image B.

visual-content-verifier.description: Extracts detailed descriptions of main subjects, backgrounds, and specific objects in Image A and Image B to prevent hallucination and mix-ups.
